title: verbascum × kozaniense
intro: Verbascum × kozaniense is a hybrid plant species of the Verbascum genus, known for its large, showy flowers and medicinal properties. It is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herb is typically prepared in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
